United States.title: US Supreme Court rejects attempt to block abortion pill access
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court has rejected a bid to block access to abortion pills in the United States.  The move is expected to have a significant impact on reproductive rights in the country.

United States.title: Biden administration to review US policy on China technology
United States.summary: The Biden administration is set to review US policy on China technology, amid growing tensions between the two nations.

United States.title: Gun control advocates push for new US laws as gun violence continues
United States.summary: Gun control advocates in the United States are pushing for new laws to be enacted in response to ongoing gun violence incidents.

South Korea.title: North Korea fires ballistic missile towards Japan, sparks global condemnation
South Korea.summary: North Korea fired a ballistic missile into the Sea of Japan on July 4, prompting a strong rebuke from the international community, including South Korea and the United States.

South Korea.title: South Korean military on high alert after North Korea's nuclear test warning
South Korea.summary: South Korea and the United States began joint military drills on July 7, amid rising tensions on the Korean Peninsula following North Korea's recent nuclear test warning.

South Korea.title: Protests erupt in South Korea over government's handling of economy
South Korea.summary: Thousands of South Koreans took to the streets on July 9 to protest against the government's economic policies, which they claim are hurting the middle class and small businesses.

Japan.title: Protests erupt in Tokyo over government's response to Fukushima nuclear waste
Japan.summary:
Protests in Tokyo turned violent as demonstrators clashed with police over the government’s handling of contaminated nuclear waste.
Several people were arrested and injured in the clashes, highlighting concerns about Japan’s ability to manage the nuclear disaster legacy.

Japan.title: Rising tensions between Japan and South Korea over historical issues
Japan.summary: The spat between Japan and South Korea over historical issues such as wartime forced labor and comfort women heated up, with both countries imposing trade curbs on each other.

Japan.title: Fukushima Daiichi nuclear plant leak sparks fears of radioactive contamination
Japan.summary: A leak at the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear plant, still under repair after the 2011 meltdown, has sparked concerns about radioactive contamination in the region.
